title: Primary Human Liver Dissociation for scSeq
guidelines:
{"blocks":[{"key":"fkug0","text":" Reagents to prepare for dissociation:
    4 tissue dissociator tubes
 
  4 falcon tube with 20ml Percoll solution 25% in PBS minus Ca+2Mg+2 (cold)
 
  4 falcon tubes with Miltenyi Biotech Debris Removal Solution
 
  1 bottle of PBS (-)Ca+2Mg+2 (warm)
 
  100ml PBS (-)Ca+2Mg+2 (+)EDTA 0.5mM (warm)
 
  100ml PBS (+)Ca+2Mg+2 (filtered and at 37°C)
 
  Liberase enzyme solution - 5.2 mg/ml stock (Sigma 000000005466202001)                        0.2 Wünsch units/ml (0.385ml stock + 9.615ml Hepatozyme media)
 
  Stop solution: 20% FBS in PBS (-)Ca++Mg++ (cold)
 
  Red blood cell lysis buffer: 1:10 dilution of Miltenyi Biotec RBC lysis buffer in ddH2O (MilliQ water)
 
  Miltenyi Biotech debris removal solution
 
  Hepatozyme media (-)growth factors (cold)
 
   
 Thumbnail image: 
 https://www.tutorialspoint.com/digestion_and_absorption/digestive_glands_liver.asp
 
 ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":1,"length":37},{"style":"bold","offset":353,"length":23},{"style":"bold","offset":513,"length":13},{"style":"bold","offset":566,"length":27},{"style":"bold","offset":673,"length":40},{"style":"bold","offset":718,"length":41},{"style":"bold","offset":767,"length":17},{"style":"sup","offset":134,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":138,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":238,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":242,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":271,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":275,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":318,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":322,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":548,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":552,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":396,"length":24}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"02DCC05ABF7E4F90A3D00A412B68B8C5","url":"https://www.sigmaaldrich.com/catalog/product/roche/05401020001?lang=en&region=US"}}}}
steps: Wash bulk liver sample in a 50 ml tube with warm PBS (-)Ca +2 Mg +2 (+)EDTA . (1/2)
Wash bulk liver sample in a 50 ml tube with warm PBS (-)Ca +2 Mg +2 (+)EDTA . (2/2)
Distribute liver into even pieces ~2-3g each.
Dice into small pieces in a petri dish with warm PBS (-)Ca +2 Mg +2 (+)EDTA .
Then transfer into tissue dissociator tubes.
Wash samples with warm (37°C) PBS (+)Ca +2 Mg +2 to activate collagenase. (1/2)
Wash samples with warm (37°C) PBS (+)Ca +2 Mg +2 to activate collagenase. (2/2)
Add warm 0.2 Wünsch units/ml Liberase collagenase solution to tissue samples.
Incubate at 37°C, 30 minutes on shaker Undetermined, Incubation on shaker at 200rpm 00:30:00, Incubation
Process each tube containing tissue through 2 “B” cycles using the “C tube” specific protocol of the Miltenyi Biotech GentleMACS tissue dissociator .
Filter each digestion through a 70 µm filter into its own respective 50 ml falcon tube - use the back of a plunger to push the filtrate through.
Add a 1:1 ratio of 20% FBS stop solution to the collected cell suspension and wash the filter; ~10 ml stop solution.
Centrifuge cell suspensions at 50g, 5 min, 4°C to pellet the hepatocyte fraction. Undetermined, Centrifugation 00:05:00, Centrifugation
Collect the NPC-containing supernatant in a separate tube and place on ice for later purification.
Resuspend each hepatocyte pellet in 5 ml of PBS . undetermined, PBS
Add 5 ml of the cell suspension carefully on top of four separate cold 25% percoll solution (25 ml final volume). undetermined, Cell suspension
Centrifuge the percoll gradients at 1250g, 20 mins, 4°C without brake. Undetermined, Centrifugation 00:20:00, Centrifugation
Aspirate percoll and debris; hepatocytes should pellet at the bottom, while debris should be floating on the top of the gradient.
Resuspend each hepatocyte pellet in 2 ml of RT RBC lysis buffer and incubate at RT for 7-10 minutes. undetermined, RT RBC lysis buffer 00:07:00, Incubation
Centrifuge 50g, 5 mins, 4°C and aspirate the red supernatant. The pellet should be light brown in color. Undetermined, Centrifugation 00:05:00, Centrifugation
Resuspend hepatocyte pellets (total/pooled) in 1 ml total cold Hepatozyme media (-)GF . undetermined, Cold Hepatozyme media (-)GF
Count cells and dilute to the appropriate concentration using Hepatozyme media. Store on ice.
Centrifuge the NPC-containing supernatants at 300g, 5 min, 4°C (1 st NPC fraction). Undetermined, Centrifugation 00:05:00, Centrifugation
Resuspend the pellet in 3.1 ml of PBS . undetermined, PBS
Centrifuge supernatant at 650g, 7 min, 4°C (2 nd NPC fraction). Undetermined, Centrifugation 00:07:00, Centrifugation
Resuspend the pellet with the 3.1 ml of PBS from the 1 st NPC fraction.
Add 900 μl of debris removal solution to the pooled NPC suspension. undetermined, Debris removal solution
Follow the Miltenyi Biotech Debris Removal protocol to produce a clean cell pellet.
Resuspend each NPC pellet in 2 ml of RT RBC lysis buffer. undetermined, RT RBC lysis buffer
Incubate resuspended NPC pellet at RT for ~10 minutes. 00:10:00, Incubation
Centrifuge at 650g, 5 min, 4°C to pellet cells. Undetermined, Centrifugation 00:05:00, Centrifugation
Aspirate red supernatant and resuspend cell pellet in 1 ml of cold Hepatozyme media (-)GF . undetermined, Cold Hepatozyme media (-)GF
Count cells and dilute to the appropriate concentration using Hepatozyme media. Store on ice.
creator: Brandon Wesley
